description: Calculate the Fractal Dimension (D) of the objects in the 'blobs.gif' sample image using Fiji. Perform the analysis on the single-pixel outlines of the objects to determine the boundary fractal dimension. Save the resulting data table to ~/Fiji_Data/results/fractal/fractal_results.csv and the log-log box count plot to ~/Fiji_Data/results/fractal/fractal_plot.png.
